annotations.request: Book a flight for one adult from Stuttgart to Berlin for tomorrow at 3 PM.

constraints.description: Resolve 'tomorrow' to a specific calendar date.
constraints.notes: Relative date requires grounding from system date.

constraints.description: Keep accommodation cost within a student budget range.
constraints.notes: ‘Student budget’ is subjective and does not define a fixed numeric threshold.
